description: Draft the HIPAA-aware Privacy Policy at /privacy (11 sections: PHI handled, uses, sharing, patient rights, security, breach notification, retention, cookies, children, changes, contact) with a sticky TOC, and the full Notice of Privacy Practices at #notice-of-privacy-practices. Carries the LegalReviewBanner until attorney sign-off.
title: HIPAA Privacy Policy + Notice of Privacy Practices
